global_context.scene_description: A full-frame UI mockup that fills the entire image — designed to look exactly like a Booking.com or Airbnb travel-booking date-search results page, but for AC installation appointments instead of hotel rooms. NO phone, NO real-world environment, NO hand. Just the UI fills the frame edge-to-edge. At the very top: a clean header bar with 'AC INSTALL — PHOENIX' as the search title and a small generic search bar below. Below the header, a list of available date options stacked vertically as cards, looking exactly like Booking.com hotel result cards. The list shows 5 dates from May through July: (1) MAY 12 - Available, $9,500, calm green tag (2) MAY 26 - Available, $9,800, slightly yellow tag (3) JUNE 14 - 'Limited - 2 left', $11,500, orange tag (4) JULY 4 - 'Only 1 left! High demand', $14,500, bold red tag, with a fire icon (5) JULY 18 - 'Sold out - waitlist', $15,500, dark red, struck-through pricing for emphasis. Each row has a small calendar icon, a 'BOOK' button on the right, and a star/heart icon. Familiar visual language — small badges, urgency cues, tiny pricing strikethroughs, all the visual machinery of urgency-booking sites. Mood: oh god, the supply is running out and the price is climbing exactly like a hotel during a conference. Pure clean UI mockup edge-to-edge, NOT a phone, NOT a hand.
